title: StackOverflow demand-capture runtime repair
why_now: Measurement hold rules blocked duplicate publisher/curator packet churn in the current review window.
Execution board said no truthful do-now handoff packet existed, so the valid same-run move was a concrete distribution architecture repair.
A fresh high-intent StackOverflow question about autonomous Claude Code workflows existed, but the lane was missing it and misclassifying its answer state.

repairs_applied.change: Added a Claude Code autonomous-wrapper search spec and tailored workflow-orchestration answer path.
Expanded fit/scoring terms so autonomous-wrapper questions qualify when they match RalphWorkflow pain.
Fixed accepted-answer detection to use accepted_answer_id instead of is_answered, preventing false rejection of open answer opportunities.
Added regression coverage for the Claude Code autonomous-wrapper case and the accepted-answer bug.

result.question_title: Autonomous mode / wrapper for Claude Code?

replacement_condition: If this question stops being placeable or the review window closes without delivery, search for the next live autonomous-workflow pain question instead of regenerating the same packet.
